name: Occasions
description: Birthdays, anniversaries, memorials, holidays, and gift reminders — one shared list of the dates your household doesn't want to miss, with countdowns to what's coming up. Pull dates in from your Contacts, or add your own.

source.query: SELECT title AS title, emoji AS emoji, member_id AS member_id, CASE WHEN kind = 'milestone' THEN printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', event_year, event_month, event_day) WHEN printf('%02d-%02d', event_month, event_day) >= substr(:today, 6, 5) THEN printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', CAST(substr(:today, 1, 4) AS INTEGER), event_month, event_day) ELSE printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', CAST(substr(:today, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) + 1, event_month, event_day) END AS at FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE countdown = 1 AND visibility = 'everyone' AND (kind <> 'milestone' OR (event_year IS NOT NULL AND printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', event_year, event_month, event_day) >= :today)) ORDER BY at LIMIT 3

SELECT id AS id, title AS title, :today AS when_at FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE event_month = CAST(strftime('%m', :today) AS INTEGER) AND event_day = CAST(strftime('%d', :today) AS INTEGER) AND (kind <> 'milestone' OR event_year = CAST(strftime('%Y', :today) AS INTEGER)) LIMIT 20
